scientific_clinical.category: 科技修护 / 实验室级无菌感
scientific_clinical.global_lighting: Clean bright studio lighting, softbox diffusion, subtle cool rim light
scientific_clinical.camera_lens: 100mm macro lens, tack-sharp focus on the product, minimal depth of field for background blur

product_shot.background: Seamless smooth light grey or pristine white gradient
product_shot.material_texture: High-end frosted glass, clear acrylic podium, perfectly transparent liquid, sterile pristine surface
product_shot.effect: Crisp edge reflection on glass, no dust or imperfections

lifestyle_shot.background: Minimal clinical interior, soft white walls, uncluttered
lifestyle_shot.material_texture: Clean professional skin, white lab coat, stainless steel tools
lifestyle_shot.effect: Natural hand applying product, clinical precision

macro_detail.background: Completely blurred bokeh, pure white ambient
macro_detail.material_texture: Translucent gel droplets, microscopic texture of serum, micro-pearls

color_system.background_constraint: Seamless smooth light grey or pristine white gradient background
color_system.dynamic_injection: Subtle #PRODUCT_COLOR# reflections in the shadows, cool ambient tones

gestalt_defaults.texture_language: 用高精度实验室摄影语言。场景必须纯净无菌。材质用 frosted glass / transparent liquid / sterile surface。光线用 softbox diffused。用 'clinical' 'sterile' 'clean studio' 等高频实拍词汇，拒绝 soft focus 和 lens flare。

natural_botanical.category: 天然植物 / 温润生机感
natural_botanical.global_lighting: Soft natural window daylight, dappled organic shadows (like tree leaves), warm ambient fill
natural_botanical.camera_lens: 50mm prime lens, creamy bokeh, soft atmospheric depth

product_shot.background: Seamless soft warm beige or earthy tone background
product_shot.material_texture: Raw botanical ingredients, unpolished stone, organic matte surfaces, handmade paper
product_shot.effect: Freshly picked herbs beside product, soft natural shadow

lifestyle_shot.background: Sunlit wooden table, window-lit room, leafy plants in background
lifestyle_shot.material_texture: Soft natural skin, linen fabric, wooden texture, fresh leaves
lifestyle_shot.effect: Morning routine, gentle hand touch, steam rising from warm water

macro_detail.background: Soft green or beige bokeh, natural blur
macro_detail.material_texture: Plant cell structure, dewdrop on leaf, fine herbal powder
macro_detail.effect: Water droplet refracting leaf texture, botanical micro details

color_system.background_constraint: Seamless soft warm beige or earthy tone background
color_system.dynamic_injection: Harmonious #PRODUCT_COLOR# tint in the ambient light, warm earthy atmosphere

gestalt_defaults.texture_language: 用自然光生活摄影语言。场景必须保留真实的自然光影和纹理。材质用 organic / botanical / raw surface。光线用 window diffused daylight。用 'natural window light' 'botanical' 'earthy tones' 'organic texture' 等词汇。

deep_hydration.category: 深层补水 / 清透水光感
deep_hydration.global_lighting: Bright continuous lighting, water caustics light reflection, sparkling highlights
deep_hydration.camera_lens: High-speed macro photography, freezing water motion, razor-sharp droplet details

product_shot.background: Seamless aquatic or purely transparent glowing gradient background
product_shot.material_texture: Macro pristine water drops, splashing pure water, translucent gel texture, highly reflective glossy surface
product_shot.effect: Water ripples, suspended droplets, light caustics on product surface

lifestyle_shot.background: Bright bathroom with window, blue-white tiles or clean marble
lifestyle_shot.material_texture: Freshly cleansed skin, water beading on skin, smooth wet surface
lifestyle_shot.effect: Splashing water, facial mist, steam on mirror

macro_detail.material_texture: Translucent gel texture, micro water droplets on skin, hydrogel sheet
macro_detail.effect: Freeze-frame water splash, liquid viscosity strands

color_system.background_constraint: Seamless aquatic or purely transparent glowing gradient background
color_system.dynamic_injection: Vibrant #PRODUCT_COLOR# passing through the liquid elements, refreshing aqua undertone

gestalt_defaults.texture_language: 用水润质感摄影语言。场景必须强调水的透明和纯净。材质用 water droplet / translucent gel / reflective liquid。光线用 bright continuous + water caustics。用 'high-speed macro' 'water caustics' 'pristine drops' 'translucent' 等词汇。

premium_luxury.category: 高端奢养 / 浓郁贵妇感
premium_luxury.global_lighting: Dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, warm golden directional key light, rich deep shadows, elegant rim separation
premium_luxury.camera_lens: 85mm cinema lens, elegant smooth focus roll-off

product_shot.background: Seamless dark moody background or elegant silk waves
product_shot.material_texture: Premium heavy glass jar, liquid gold texture, smooth silk fabric background, highly polished metallic accents
product_shot.effect: Golden reflection on glass, deep shadow gradient, luxurious rim light

lifestyle_shot.background: Dim elegant boudoir, velvet texture, candlelit ambiance
lifestyle_shot.material_texture: Silk robe, polished vanity, soft velvet, sophisticated skin
lifestyle_shot.effect: Evening skincare ritual, gentle luxurious touch

macro_detail.background: Pure dark ambient, golden bokeh lights
macro_detail.material_texture: Pearlescent cream texture, gold micro-particles, rich thick balm, caviar beads
macro_detail.effect: Rich texture spreading on skin, gold flake shimmer

color_system.background_constraint: Seamless dark moody background or elegant silk waves
color_system.dynamic_injection: Rich #PRODUCT_COLOR# base with elegant gold/silver highlights, dramatic deep shadows

gestalt_defaults.text_zone: top 20% (light text) or bottom 25% (light text on dark overlay)
gestalt_defaults.texture_language: 用高端奢侈品摄影语言。场景必须用深色背景突出产品贵气。材质用 heavy glass / liquid gold / silk / metallic。光线用 chiaroscuro dramatic。用 'chiaroscuro' 'golden rim light' 'dark luxury' 'elegant premium' 等词汇。文字必须使用浅色（白色/金色）以在深色背景下可读。

herbal_earthy_root.category: 草本固发 / 根系本草感
herbal_earthy_root.price_tier: hair care, scalp treatment, herbal formulas
herbal_earthy_root.global_lighting: Warm directional sunlight filtering through dense forest, deep rich ambient shadows
herbal_earthy_root.camera_lens: 100mm macro lens, tack-sharp focus on organic textures, dramatic depth of field

product_shot.background: Seamless warm earth tone or soft beige seamless gradient
product_shot.material_texture: Raw aged wood, fresh dark green moss, macro ginseng roots, rich amber liquid, organic matte surfaces
product_shot.effect: Deep natural shadow pool beneath product, warm golden rim light

lifestyle_shot.background: Dappled forest filter light, soft out-of-focus greenery
lifestyle_shot.material_texture: Natural scalp with herbal paste, rough pottery bowl, wooden ladle
lifestyle_shot.effect: Steam rising from herbal decoction, morning forest ambiance

macro_detail.background: Warm brown bokeh, floating herbal particles
macro_detail.material_texture: Ginseng root cross-section, dripping amber liquid, fine herbal powder suspended in oil
macro_detail.effect: Macro amber drop with suspended herbal particles, root fiber details

color_system.background_constraint: Seamless warm earth tone or soft beige background
color_system.dynamic_injection: Deep amber and earthy #PRODUCT_COLOR# tones suffusing the shadows, warm forest undertone

gestalt_defaults.texture_language: 用有机草本摄影语言。场景必须保留原始材质的自然纹理。材质用 aged wood / moss / ginseng root / amber liquid。光线用 forest dappled sunlight。用 'organic texture' 'earthy' 'botanical macro' 'raw natural' 'root fiber' 等词汇。

refreshing_botanical_breeze.category: 清透植萃 / 呼吸生机感
refreshing_botanical_breeze.price_tier: green serums, botanical toners, fresh formulas
refreshing_botanical_breeze.global_lighting: Bright diffused daylight, sparkling water caustics, soft glowing ambient fill
refreshing_botanical_breeze.camera_lens: High-speed macro capture, freezing flying water droplets, sharp crisp details

product_shot.background: Seamless soft glowing pastel green or airy white gradient background
product_shot.material_texture: Translucent green leaves, frosty glass, floating fresh herbs, purely transparent liquid, botanical extract
product_shot.effect: Water condensation on frosty glass, floating herb particles in suspension

lifestyle_shot.background: Morning garden or windowsill with green leafy plants, bright natural light
lifestyle_shot.material_texture: Freshly cleansed dewy skin, cotton pad with green essence, fresh green juice
lifestyle_shot.effect: Morning skincare routine, splashing refreshing essence, steam with herbal scent

macro_detail.background: Pure soft green gradient bokeh, floating water droplets
macro_detail.material_texture: Translucent leaf cell structure, macro water bead, fine green powder suspended in gel, fresh herb petal
macro_detail.effect: Water droplet refracting leaf veins, freeze-frame splash of green essence

color_system.background_constraint: Seamless soft glowing pastel green or airy white gradient background
color_system.dynamic_injection: Vibrant #PRODUCT_COLOR# passing through the translucent botanical elements, fresh crisp atmosphere

gestalt_defaults.texture_language: 用清透植物摄影语言。场景必须透亮有呼吸感。材质用 translucent leaf / frosty glass / floating herb / fresh extract。光线用 bright diffused daylight。用 'botanical' 'dewy' 'fresh green' 'translucent' 'bright macro' 等词汇。
